description:
Update the Nx Witness media server name to 'CORP-WH07-NVR01' and its location metadata to 'Warehouse 07, Dock Level, Server Closet B' using the API. Generate a VMS architecture documentation file at '/home/ga/Documents/vms_architecture.json' and a human-readable summary at '/home/ga/Documents/vms_architecture_summary.txt'. The JSON file must include system info, server details (including the updated name and location), and all attached cameras according to this schema:

{
  "generatedAt": "<ISO8601_timestamp>",
  "system": {
    "name": "<system_name>",
    "version": "<version>",
    "localSystem

metadata.target_location: Warehouse 07, Dock Level, Server Closet B
